creator: kontakt@schweppmedia.de
text:
When I try to start qgis (2.18.2_1) I get the following output:

Warning: QCss::Parser - Failed to load file  "/style.qss" 
QGIS died on signal 10Could not read link (2:No such file or directory)
[1]    41650 abort (core dumped)  qgis

I run FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p8 and qgis (2.18.2_1) package is installed.
